description: Immerse yourself in the enchanting landscapes and rich history of Northern Ireland, where the stunning coastlines and ancient castles whisper tales of the past. This 5-day adventure is designed for couples eager to explore the filming locations of their favorite series, Game of Thrones, while indulging in the local culture and cuisine. From the rugged beauty of the Giant's Causeway to the vibrant streets of Belfast, each day promises a blend of excitement and romance. Get ready to discover hidden gems and iconic sites that will make your hearts race and your spirits soar!

days.title: Arrival in Belfast and Game of Thrones Exploration

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at The Dock Cafe, known for its locally sourced ingredients and cozy atmosphere. Try their famous full Irish breakfast to fuel up for a day of exploration!

Dive into the rich maritime history of Belfast at Titanic Belfast. This award-winning visitor attraction tells the story of the Titanic, from her conception in the city to her tragic end. Don't miss the interactive exhibits and the stunning architecture!
Enjoy a casual lunch at The Harland Bar, located near the Titanic Quarter. Their menu features a variety of local dishes and craft beers, perfect for a relaxing break after your museum visit.

activities.activity: Explore the Game of Thrones Studio Tour
activities.description: Immerse yourself in the world of Westeros at the Game of Thrones Studio Tour. Walk through iconic sets, see costumes, and learn behind-the-scenes secrets from the making of the series. A must for any fan!
Head to Belfast Castle for stunning views of the city and a chance to explore the beautiful gardens. The castle's rich history and picturesque setting make it a perfect spot for a leisurely stroll.

Indulge in a delightful dinner at The Ginger Bistro, known for its creative dishes and vibrant atmosphere. Their menu features a mix of local and international flavors, ensuring a memorable dining experience.

activities.activity: Evening stroll along the River Lagan
activities.description: End your day with a romantic evening stroll along the River Lagan. The riverside walk offers beautiful views of the city lights and is a perfect way to unwind after a busy day of exploration.

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic drive along the coast.

activities.description: Explore the iconic Giant's Causeway, a UNESCO World Heritage site known for its unique hexagonal basalt columns formed by volcanic activity. Take a leisurely walk along the coastal paths and enjoy the stunning views of the Atlantic Ocean.

Enjoy a delicious lunch at The Nook, located near the Giant's Causeway. This cozy spot offers local dishes and a great view of the surrounding landscape, perfect for recharging after your morning exploration.

Visit the Dark Hedges, a stunning avenue of beech trees that has become famous as a filming location for Game of Thrones. Walk along the tree-lined road and capture some memorable photos in this enchanting setting.
Head to Ballintoy Harbour, another picturesque location featured in Game of Thrones. Enjoy the rugged coastline and perhaps grab a coffee at the local café while soaking in the dramatic scenery.
Drive back to Belfast, reflecting on the day's adventures and the stunning landscapes you've encountered. The drive will take about an hour, giving you time to relax before dinner.

activities.activity: Dinner at The Crown Liquor Saloon
activities.description: Dine at The Crown Liquor Saloon, a historic pub known for its Victorian decor and delicious traditional Irish fare. It's a great place to unwind and enjoy the local atmosphere after a day of exploration.

activities.activity: Shopping for Game of Thrones Merchandise
activities.description: Spend your evening shopping for Game of Thrones merchandise at local shops in Belfast. Look for unique souvenirs and collectibles to take home as a reminder of your adventure in Northern Ireland.

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic drive through Northern Ireland's countryside.

activities.description: Start your exploration at the iconic Derry Walls, which offer a fascinating glimpse into the city's history. Walk along the ramparts and enjoy stunning views of the city and the River Foyle.
Savor a delicious lunch at The Exchange, a cozy café known for its locally sourced ingredients and hearty dishes. Try their famous Irish stew or a classic fish and chips.

Visit the Museum of Free Derry to learn about the city's tumultuous history and the civil rights movement. The exhibits are powerful and thought-provoking, providing insight into the struggles faced by the local community.
Stroll through the Craft Village, a charming area filled with artisan shops and galleries. It's a perfect spot to pick up unique souvenirs and Game of Thrones merchandise.
Enjoy dinner at The Sooty Olive, a popular restaurant offering a modern twist on traditional Irish cuisine. Their menu features seasonal dishes and a great selection of local beers.

activities.activity: Evening Walk along the River Foyle
activities.description: End your day with a leisurely walk along the River Foyle. The riverside path is beautifully lit at night, providing a romantic atmosphere to reflect on your day.

days.title: Belfast and Game of Thrones Studio Tour

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic drive from Derry to Belfast.

activities.description: Dive into the world of Westeros at the Game of Thrones Studio Tour. Explore iconic sets, costumes, and props from the series, and learn behind-the-scenes secrets that brought the epic story to life.
Savor a hearty lunch at The Dirty Onion, a rustic pub known for its traditional Irish dishes and vibrant atmosphere. Try their famous Irish stew or a classic fish and chips.
Stroll through Belfast City Centre, where you can admire the stunning architecture and vibrant street art. Don't miss the iconic City Hall and the nearby shopping areas for some local souvenirs.
Explore St. George's Market, one of Belfast's oldest attractions. Here, you can find local crafts, delicious food stalls, and unique Game of Thrones merchandise to take home as souvenirs.

activities.activity: Dinner at The Crown Liquor Saloon
activities.description: End your day with dinner at The Crown Liquor Saloon, a beautifully restored Victorian pub. Enjoy a selection of local beers and traditional dishes in a stunning setting.
Relax and unwind at your hotel after a day filled with adventure. Enjoy the comfort and amenities before resting for the night.

transit.memo: Direct flight back to Washington D.C.

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at The Fitzwilliam Hotel, known for its delicious Irish breakfast options. Enjoy a mix of traditional dishes to fuel your journey ahead.

activities.activity: Visit the Game of Thrones Studio Tour
activities.description: Dive into the world of Westeros at the Game of Thrones Studio Tour. Explore the iconic sets, costumes, and props from the series, and learn behind-the-scenes secrets that brought the show to life.
Enjoy a delightful lunch at The Potted Hen, a cozy restaurant offering a variety of local dishes and a great selection of drinks. Perfect for a relaxing meal before your flight.

activities.activity: Shopping for Game of Thrones Merchandise
activities.description: Before heading to the airport, take some time to shop for exclusive Game of Thrones merchandise at local shops in Belfast. Find unique souvenirs to remember your trip.
